MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,415.00 FILED BY PATELLA, TOBIAS AS TO DEFENDANT 1700 MARKET ST., LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2022 - JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF TOBIAS PATELLA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 1700 MARKET ST., LLC. REPRESENTED BY JONATHAN NG, PROPERTY MANAGER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATELLA, TOBIAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 1700 MARKET ST., LLC $1,415.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,535.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO TOBIAS PATELLA-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
